pandoc 
  to: html
  output-file: index.html
  standalone: true
  title-prefix: Nina Galanter
  section-divs: true
  html-math-method: mathjax
  wrap: none
  default-image-extension: png
  css:
    - styles.css
  toc: true
  
metadata
  document-css: false
  link-citations: true
  date-format: long
  lang: en
  editor: source
  theme: sandstone
  linkcolor: '#008ae6'
  title: Nina Galanter (she/they)
  about:
    template: solana
    image: ng_pic.jpg
    image-width: 10em
    image-shape: round
    links:
      - text: Google Scholar
        href: 'https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=382zhZMAAAAJ&hl=en'
      - icon: github
        text: Github
        href: 'https://github.com/ngalanter'
